ramadan-pita-with-kashar-cheese-lezzet.name: Ramadan Pita With Kashar Cheese
instructions: 1. Relate the cheese of Kasar.
2. Remove the part in the middle of leaving space from the edges of the pidenin.
3. Fill the grated cheese into the cavity.
4. Clean the beans of the pepper and sprinkle on the cheese and cheese.
5. Cook the cake and pepper and cook until the cheese melt in the oven of 200 degrees.
6. Serve hot.

raspberry-and-pistachio-semifreddo.name: Raspberry And Pistachio Semifreddo
instructions: Line a 9x5-inch loaf pan with parchment paper, leaving an overhang on both sides. Set aside.

Combine egg yolks with 3 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon honey in the large bowl of an electric mixer fitted with a paddle attachment; beat until volume doubles and mixture is pale and creamy, about 10 minutes.

Beat heavy cream in a separate bowl with an electric mixer until firm peaks form, 3 to 4 minutes. Gently fold whipped cream into egg yolk mixture. Pour into the prepared pan, smoothing the top. Cover with plastic wrap.
Freeze until semifreddo is chilled, about 90 minutes. Remove from the freezer and stir in raspberries and pistachio nuts until evenly distributed. Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours.
Let semifreddo soften in the refrigerator before serving, about 15 minutes. Turn out of the pan and cut into slices.

raspberry-crumble-bars.name: Raspberry Crumble Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat an 8-inch square cake pan with cooking spray.

Beat flour, sugar, butter, and egg in a large bowl with an electric mixer until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Set aside 2 cups crumb mixture; firmly press remaining mixture into bottom of the prepared pan.
Spread jam over crumb mixture to within ½-inch from edges; sprinkle reserved 2 cups crumb mixture over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until light golden brown, 40 to 50 minutes. Cool completely before cutting into 25 squares.

raspberry-trileche-lezzet.name: Raspberry Trileche
instructions: 1. Separate the yolks and whites of the eggs.
2. Add sugar to the yellows uniformly with the mixer.
3. Clean and dry mixer with salt in a pinch of whites; up to become snow using
4. Mix dry materials in a separate bowl.
5. Add egg yolks and light &lye;remove.
6. Söndi slowly string with the spatula without spinning and add the mixture to a square oven container in 30x30 to you greased;cu and du with the spatula.
7. Bake 40-45 minutes in the oven heated above 160 degrees.
8. Take the cheerbeti for;silk, powder sugar and cream in a deep pot.
9. Mix and heat the powder until sugar melt.
10. Take from fire without boiling and leave to cool.
11. 11. 11. 11. From the oven to the split and mulberry walk to the cake.
12. Wait until it is completely milking.
12. For August Ü; frambuases with blender to take into a sauce pot.

15. Add melt and frambuaza with water to the starch and cool it from fire and stirring the break in aside.
16. Cover the dessert's u with sauce.
17. September Service by s&uuml with fruit and mint leaves.
18.  Afiyet olsun.

ratatouille-pasta.name: Ratatouille Pasta

ingredients.prep: torn if large, plus more for serving

instructions: Cut 1 large or 2 medium Italian eggplants into ½" pieces. Transfer to a colander set over a medium bowl and sprinkle with 2 tsp. salt. Let sit 30 minutes. Your eggplant might start to discolor and should start to release some brownish liquid that will fall into the bowl below. That’s good! It’s losing excess moisture that would prevent it from getting silky-soft.

Meanwhile, cut 1 large or 2 small red bell peppers and 1 large zucchini into ½" pieces. Transfer to a medium bowl. Peel 2 medium onions, cut through root end, then slice through root end into thin slivers. Transfer to bowl with bell peppers. Halve 1 pint cherry tomatoes (the fastest—but dorkiest—way to do this is to sandwich them between two quart container lids) and transfer to a small bowl. Smash 4 garlic cloves, then coarsely chop and add to bowl with tomatoes. Slice 1 lemon in half; set aside. Finely grate 1½ oz. Parmesan with a Microplane or the small holes of a box grater into another small bowl.

Your eggplant needs special treatment: Cooking it separately guarantees that you can make it tender and golden (rather than chewy and gray) without over-cooking it or causing the other veg to get soggy. When eggplant has been sitting 30 minutes (okay, 25 if you’re antsy), gently squeeze it to get rid of any more moisture (less moisture means more browning). No need to go crazy, though.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or heavy pot over high until shimmering. Once hot (test with one piece for starters!), add half of eggplant and stir to coat in oil. Cook, stirring every 3 minutes or so (you want to leave it undisturbed while also making sure lots of pieces get their time against the hot pan), until eggplant is golden, with some pieces starting to brown and char, 5–7 minutes. Reduce heat to medium if eggplant is browning too quickly. Using a slotted spoon or fish spatula, transfer to a plate. If any eggplant pieces stick, just scrape them up—no biggie. Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin oil over high. Cook remaining eggplant using same process, 5–7 minutes. Transfer to plate with cooked eggplant.

Scrape off any bits of eggplant from pot if needed (no need to wipe out). Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil over medium-high. Add ¼ cup capers and ½ tsp. red pepper flakes (don’t be alarmed if capers sputter and foam—it’s because they’re wet!). Cook, stirring, until bubbling subsides, 30–60 seconds.

Add onion-pepper mixture, season with 1½ tsp. salt, and cook, stirring frequently, scraping bottom of pan, and reducing heat if vegetables are getting too brown, until vegetables are softened, slumped, and have started to take on lots of color, 12–15 minutes. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil (this is for your pasta).

Add tomato-garlic mixture to sauce, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon, until almost all tomatoes have burst and vegetables are starting to break down and deeply caramelize, about 10 minutes. Keep an eye on it and reduce heat if veg is getting too dark for your liking.

Finish the sauce: Return eggplant to pot and cook until vegetables are tender but the vegetable pieces are still distinct (you don't want total mush), about 5 more minutes. Taste and season with salt.
Add pasta to boiling water right after you add the eggplant, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Before draining, scoop out 1 cup pasta cooking liquid with a liquid measuring cup.

Now the exciting part: Ratatouille and pasta join forces as one. Reduce heat over sauce to low. Add drained pasta and stir to coat in sauce. Add 1 cup Parmesan, pour ½ cup pasta cooking liquid over, then stir vigorously with a rubber spatula or wooden spoon until a creamy sauce forms with no clumps of cheese. Add more pasta cooking liquid as necessary if pasta starts to stiffen. Remove from heat. Squeeze juice from ½ lemon over, then stir in 1½ cups basil. Taste for salt and lemon juice.
Divide pasta among bowls. Top with cheese, basil, and red pepper flakes. Drizzle with oil. Don’t be sad if you can’t finish it all: It’s even better as cold leftovers.

raw-mustard-greens-salad-with-gruyere-an.name: Raw Mustard Greens Salad With Gruyère And Anchovy Croutons

ingredients.prep: center rib and stem cut from each leaf, leaves cut crosswise into 1/2-inch-wide strips

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Combine anchovies and garlic in small bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Place bread cubes in medium bowl. Drizzle 2 tablespoons anchovy oil over, tossing to coat. Sprinkle bread with salt, pepper, and half of cheese; toss to coat. Spray rimmed baking sheet with nonstick spray. Scatter bread on sheet. Bake croutons until crisp and golden, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes. Set aside.

Measure 8 cups (loosely packed) mustard greens and place in large bowl (reserve any remaining greens for another use). Add croutons and remaining cheese to bowl. Whisk 5 teaspoons lemon juice into remaining anchovy oil; season dressing with salt, pepper, and more lemon juice, if desired. Add dressing to salad; toss to coat.

recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.name: Recipe For Grilled Chicken Breasts With Garlic Green Beans
recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pollo a la plancha con judías verdes al ajo
instructions: He cuts the end of the beans and cuts them in half.
He steamed his beans for about 4 minutes in salt water till they whitened.
After that time, remove the beans from the water and put them in a bowl with cold water to stop the cooking and to keep them with the dente. Listen to them and let them rest.
Sazona las pechugas de pollo con sal, pimienta y paprika por ambos lados.
Calienta una plancha con un poco de aceite de oliva.
Roast chicken breasts 4 to 6 minutes from each side, depend on the thickness of the pieces. They have to be golden and juicy inside.
Una vez listas, retira de la plancha y deja reposar las pechugas.
Warm a frying pan with olive oil and scattering garlic with beans. Season with salt and pepper and cook for about 5 minutes.
Serve the breasts with the beans and enjoy this rich plate.

recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-meat-and.name: Recipe For Peppers Stuffed With Meat And Cheese
recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-meat-and.original_name: Receta de pimientos rellenos de carne y queso

ingredients.item: 450 gr de filete de res cortado  (en rodajas)

instructions: To purify the oven at 200 ″ C

In a frying pan with medium heat, add a tablet of oil and steak into slices. Season with garlic powder, ½ teaspoon pepper, 1 teaspoon salt and the english wilce. Mix and cook for 5 minutes or till the meal's well baked. Transfer the meal to a bowl and leave the judges in the frying pan.
Add butter and onion to frying pan with meat juices and cook till onion's tender about 10 minutes.
Then add green peppers, the remaining ½ teaspoon of pepper and a teaspoon of salt, and cook for 10 minutes or till oils and peppers are caramelized.
Corta la parte superior de los pimientos rojos y limpia removiendo las semillas y venas del pimiento.

Coloca los pimientos en un recipiente para horno con el lado cortado hacia arriba y empieza el siguiente procedimiento para rellenar: Colocar un poco de relleno de carne en cada pimiento, seguido de los pimientos y las cebollas, luego 3 medias rodajas de queso. Repita con el resto del filete, luego el resto de los pimientos y las cebollas. Coloca una rebanada entera de queso encima de cada pimiento.
Bake at 170 been 3 been for 20 minutes or till the cheese's been broken. Decor with cilantro and enjoy.

recipe-for-pineapple-milkshake-with-vani.name: Recipe For Pineapple Milkshake With Vanilla Ice Cream
recipe-for-pineapple-milkshake-with-vani.original_name: Receta rápida de malteada de piña con helado de vainilla

ingredients.item: 1 cup (taza) de helado de vainilla  ((10 minutos fuera del congelador))

instructions: Put pineapple and milk in a glass of blender, pineapple should have no eyes.
Also add the ice cream, that should be soft so that it can blend well.
Licua a alta velocidad durante 1 minuto.
A pineapple with a pineapple and a pineapple have to be put up with a pineapple without a pineapple, and if that's the case, we'll have to come back and get them for 30 seconds.
Sirve y decora con crema batida y una cereza.

recipe-to-make-delicious-pretzels-comede.name: Recipe To Make Delicious Pretzels
instructions: In a bowl mix warm water with sugar and yeast and leave to stand for 5 minutes so that the yeast begins to ferment.
Luego, incorpora la harina, sal y aceite de oliva.
Mezcla hasta obtener una masa para luego pasarla a la mesa de trabajo y empezar el trabajo de amasado.
Amasa for 5 minutes or until the ingredients are integrated.
It forms a ball and puts it into a slightly greased bowl.
Cover with film paper and let rest for 1 hour.
It purifies the oven at 232 and 3.
When the mass's twice its size, place it at the work table, remove his air by slightly chewing
Corta la masa en 8 partes.
Extiende en forma de cuerdas finas.
Retuerce los dos extremos para darle forma de pretzel.
A pot with enough water adds sodium bicarbonate and leads to boiling.
Incorpora los pretzels y deja hervir durante 30 segundos por cada lado.
Then remove them from the water and place them on a baking plate with paper for the oven.
Con un pincel de cocina, colorea los pretzels con el huevo batido y espolvorea sal gruesa.
Hornea at 232 been 3 been for 10 to 15 minutes or till golden.
Disfruta.

recipe-to-prepare-a-monte-cristo-sandwic.name: Recipe To Prepare A Monte Cristo Sandwich
recipe-to-prepare-a-monte-cristo-sandwic.original_name: Receta para preparar un sándwich Monte Cristo

ingredients.item: 3 free Swiss cheese of your choice
4 pits ham york or turkey breast

instructions: Take his bark out of his loaves of bread
En un plato coloca el huevo y la leche, mezcla bien
Add pepper and salt to your taste and incorporates all the ingredients
Bate ligeramente con un tenedor
Unta las rebanadas con mayonesa y mostaza
Each slice adds ham and cheese
Warm your two layers of sandwich and clamp it up a little.
Fold it through the beamed egg, get well impregnated
Put the butter up in a teflon frying pan
Dore your sandwich slightly from both sides and edges
Take it out of the frying pan and enjoy

recipe-to-prepare-banana-jelly-comedera.name: Recipe To Prepare Banana Jelly
recipe-to-prepare-banana-jelly-comedera.original_name: Receta para preparar gelatina de plátano
instructions: To make the candy put the sugar and water into a small pot
Drop over medium heat till you have its characteristic caramel and reserve
Hidrata la grenetina en la leche entera dejando reposar 5 minutos
Destroy Grenetin to bath Maria
Loan half cream, bananas, condensed milk and milk with Grenetin
At the mold or pot where you made the caramel adds the blend of your flan and refrigerates an hour
Serves on a plate and enjoys

recipe-to-prepare-peppers-stuffed-with-t.name: Recipe To Prepare Peppers Stuffed With Tuna With Cheese
recipe-to-prepare-peppers-stuffed-with-t.original_name: Receta para preparar pimientos rellenos de atún con queso
instructions: Preheat the oven at 200 been 3 or 218 been 3
Cut the peppers in half and get them out of their heart
Hierve los pimientos con un poco de sal por unos 10 minutos
In a bowl mix well drained tuna, Greek yogurt, mustard, salt, pepper, celery, garlic salt and well minced onion
Mezcla todo muy bien
Filling with your tuna mix
Espolvorea queso por encima y lleva al horno
Hornea de 10 a 15 minutos
Sirve y disfruta

red-chicken-enchiladas.name: Red Chicken Enchiladas
instructions: Melt butter with olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and salt; cook and stir until onion starts to turn golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in flour, chile powder, cumin, chipotle powder, black pepper, oregano, cayenne, and cinnamon. Cook and stir until fragrant, about 3 minutes. Add minced garlic and tomato paste; stir until fully combined. Pour in chicken broth and whisk until smooth.

Increase heat to high and bring sauce to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors come together, about 10 minutes. Taste and season as desired. Blend sauce with an immersion blender.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Lightly brush tortillas with oil. Heat a small cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Heat tortillas until flexible, about 30 seconds per side.

Cover the bottom of the skillet with a scoop of enchilada sauce. Place a tortilla on top and add 1/2 of the chicken, 1/3 of the Jack cheese, and 1/2 the cilantro and green onions. Spoon on more sauce and repeat layers, finishing with sauce and the remaining cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese melts and sauce is bubbling, 10 to 15 minutes.

red-fruit-jam-teleculinaria.name: Red Fruit Jam
instructions: Lay down the red fruit for a pot, add half the sugar and brandy and bring it to the fire, always stirring until it is sweet style. Remove from the fire and reserve.

Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. Separate the egg yolks from the whites. Pour the yolks into a separate pot, add the essence of vanilla, the remaining sugar, milk and masena flour. Take it to the fire, always stirring until it thickens. Then remove, put it in a bowl, add the cognac and the gelatin leaves well run.
Bata separadamente as claras em castelo e as natas em chantilly firme e junte ao creme anterior. Disponha em copinhos camadas alternadas de creme e doce de frutos vermelhos. Decore a gosto e sirva.

red-fruit-semifreddo-cups-teleculinaria.name: Red Fruit Semifreddo Cups
red-fruit-semifreddo-cups-teleculinaria.original_name: Taças de semifrio de frutos vermelhos
instructions: Prepare the strawberry Jell-O by following the pack instructions. Put it in a container and take it to the refrigerator until solidify. Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water.

Crush the strawberries along with yogurt and condensed milk. On the other hand, beat the cream until it is firm and wrap it with the previous preparation. Melt the gelatin leaves in a sea bath or in the microwave without letting it boil. Add to the previous preparation and stir until the gelatin is well incorporated. Take it to the fridge until it solidifies.
In individual bowls, have alternate layers of strawberry mousse and gelatin cut into pieces. Decorate with the red fruits and mint leaves and serve.

red-raspberry-orange-jam.name: Red Raspberry-orange Jam

ingredients.prep: such as Sure-Jell® Pectin Light for less or no sugar

instructions: Inspect 7 half-pint jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until jam is ready.
Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.
Add raspberries to a blender or food processor; blend until smooth. Pour into a large saucepan.
Cut off orange zest and finely chop. Add to the saucepan with the raspberries.
Segment oranges and remove all the white pith, seeds, and fibrous membranes. Cut orange filets into small pieces; you should have 2 cups. Combine orange pieces with lemon juice in a bowl and mix.
Add orange pieces and 1/4 cup sugar to the saucepan with the raspberries.
Stir in pectin and slowly bring to a full rolling boil.
Add remaining sugar and stir to dissolve. Return to a full rolling boil on high heat and boil for exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Skim off any foam with a ladle or a large spoon.
Remove from heat and ladle jam into the prepared jars, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top.
Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles.
Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any spills. Top with lids and tightly screw on rings.
Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder.
Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.
Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart.
Let rest for 24 hours without moving the jars.
Gently press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down.
Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

red-wine-vinegar-and-black-pepper-mignon.name: Red Wine Vinegar And Black Pepper Mignonette
instructions: Combine shallot, vinegar, and pepper in a small bowl; season lightly with salt. (Serve alongside oysters.)

red-braised-pork-belly-hong-shao-rou.name: Red-braised Pork Belly (hong Shao Rou)

ingredients.prep: boneless pork belly, cut into 1" pieces
white and pale green parts coarsely chopped, dark green parts thinly sliced

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add pork and cook, skimming off foam from surface, 5 minutes (this blanching step gets rid of any impurities on the pork, making it more tender; don't skip this step!). Transfer pork to paper towels to drain.

Wipe out pot. Heat 3 Tbsp. water in pot over medium-high. Add sugar, stir to dissolve, and cook, stirring constantly, until syrup thickens and turns a pale amber color, about 4 minutes. Reduce heat to medium and return pork to pot, swirling so all sides are covered in caramel. Add white and pale green parts of scallions, ginger, garlic, and star anise. Cook, tossing, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add soy sauce and wine and cook, stirring, until slightly reduced, about 1 minute.

Pour in 3 cups water (it should just barely cover pork; add more if needed). Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cook, partially covered and stirring occasionally, until pork is tender, 50–60 minutes.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer pork to a plate; remove pot from heat. Let sauce cooking liquid cool slightly so rendered fat can rise to the surface. Using a ladle, skim off as much fat as possible (save it for another use).
Return pot to medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is slightly thickened and glossy, 12–15 minutes. Return pork to pot and toss to gently reheat and coat with sauce.
Transfer pork to a platter. Pour sauce over. Top with dark green scallion parts and serve with rice alongside.

restaurant-style-buffalo-chicken-wings.name: Restaurant-style Buffalo Chicken Wings
instructions: Whisk together flour, paprika, cayenne pepper, and salt in a large bowl.

Place chicken wings in the bowl with flour mixture and toss until evenly coated. Transfer wings to a 9x13-inch glass baking dish and arrange in a single layer. Cover and refrigerate for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
Add about 1 inch oil to a deep, heavy skillet; heat to 191°C (190 degrees C). (The oil should be just enough to cover wings entirely.)

Meanwhile, combine butter, hot sauce, pepper, and garlic powder in a separate small saucepan over low heat. Cook and stir until butter is melted and mixture is thoroughly blended. Remove from the heat and reserve for serving.

Fry coated wings in the hot oil for 10 to 15 minutes, or until they begin to crisp and turn brown. Maintain the oil temperature while cooking. Remove cooked wings from hot oil and let drain on paper towels or a wire rack.
Transfer wings to a platter and drizzle hot sauce over top; or mix wings and hot sauce in a bowl until coated.

rhubarb-cookies.name: Rhubarb Cookies
instructions: Pulse oats in a food processor until smaller crumbs form while some larger pieces remain intact, 8 to 10 pulses. Add oats to a large bowl along with flour, baking soda, ginger, and nutmeg.
Beat butter and sugar with an electric mixer on medium-high speed until fluffy, about 3 minutes. Beat in eggs, one at a time, until incorporated.
On low speed, add the oat mixture to the butter mixture, beating until combined, about 30 seconds.
Stir in rhubarb and crystallized ginger.
Cover and transfer bowl to a refrigerator to chill for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 3 large baking sheets with parchment paper.
Scoop dough (about 1 ½ tablespoons per cookie) onto prepared baking sheets, leaving about 2 inches in between each cookie.
Working in batches, bake in the preheated oven until golden brown on the bottoms and sides, 12 to 15 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool briefly on baking sheets.
Transfer to a wire rack to finish cooling (they will firm up as they cool), about 30 minutes. Repeat with remaining cookies.

rhubarb-plum-jam.name: Rhubarb Plum Jam
instructions: Bring rhubarb, plums, sugar, orange juice, water, and orange zest to a boil in a saucepan over medium heat. Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, stirring occasionally, until thick, about 45 minutes.

Meanwhile, inspect six pint-sized jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until jam is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.

Pack jam into hot, sterilized jars, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 5 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and let rest, several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. Remove the rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

ribeye-tostadas-with-guacamole.name: Ribeye Tostadas With Guacamole
instructions: Make the steak: Toss together the cubed steak, oil, salt, cumin, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper, smoked paprika, and lime juice in a large bowl until evenly coated. Let marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.

Preheat the grill to 204°C (200°C). Skewer the marinated steak onto about 7 skewers. Arrange the skewers diagonally across clean grill grates. Cover the grill lid, and cook until cooked through, about 20 minutes, flipping skewers halfway through. Remove from the grill. Let rest for about 10 minutes. Remove the steak from the skewers, and cut into bite-sized pieces. Cover with foil to keep warm.
While the steak cooks, make the guacamole: Place the avocados, serranos, lime juice, finely chopped cilantro, salt, and red pepper flakes in a large bowl. Mash and mix until slightly chunky.
Spread a layer of the guacamole on each tostada. Top evenly with the steak, pickled onions, and cilantro. Serve immediately.

ricotta-cheese.name: Ricotta Cheese
instructions: Line a large colander with 2 layers of cheesecloth and place over a large bowl.

In a 5 to 6 quart pot over medium heat, heat milk, cream, and salt, stirring occasionally to avoid scorching, until mixture foams and comes to a boil. Reduce heat to low and add lemon juice. Simmer, stirring, until mixture curdles, 2 minutes for small curds. If you'd like a larger, dryer curd, continue to simmer an additional 2 minutes.

Pour mixture into cheesecloth lined colander and drain 10 to 15 minutes or until desired texture is achieved. Empty liquid from bowl if necessary to ensure proper draining. Reserved whey can be used in smoothies or soup. Chill ricotta until ready to use.
Serve spread onto crostini with a drizzle of olive oil, dollop over pasta or pizza, or stir into scrambled eggs. Ricotta will keep in the fridge for 1 week.

ritz-everything-bites-with-lox-and-schme.name: Ritz 'everything' Bites With Lox And Schmear
instructions: To make schmear, combine cream cheese, sun dried tomatoes, capers, red onion, garlic, and lemon juice in a bowl; stir well to combine.
Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour (or longer) so flavors can meld.
To prepare, spread 1-1/2 tsp. schmear on RITZ Everything Cracker and top with cucumber half and piece of smoked salmon.

ritz-steakhouse-bites.name: Ritz Steakhouse Bites
instructions: Heat olive oil in saute pan over medium heat. Add spinach and cover for 1 minute to steam. Uncover and stir spinach until it is wilted. Drain spinach, dry between paper towels, and chop. Melt butter in the same pan over medium heat. Add shallots and saute for a minute. Add heavy cream and nutmeg; stir to combine. Add chopped spinach and combine thoroughly. Remove from heat when spinach is creamy. Add salt and pepper. Set aside.
Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a separate saute pan; add shallots and white wine vinegar. Cook until all liquid has evaporated, about a minute. Remove from the pan; set aside to cool.
Add egg yolk and lemon juice to blender; slowly blend in half cup of melted butter until mixture is smooth and creamy. Pour into shallots mixture. Stir in chopped fresh tarragon.

To assemble bites, place about 1-1/2 teaspoons creamed spinach on top of a RITZ Cracker. Place a slice of steak on top of the creamed spinach, then drizzle with about 1-1/2 teaspoon bearnaise sauce over the steak.

roast-bone-marrow-and-parsley-salad.name: Roast Bone Marrow And Parsley Salad

ingredients.item: Coarse gray sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Place bones, wider cut side down, in an ovenproof skillet or roasting pan. Roast bones until marrow is soft and begins to separate from bone but before it begins to melt, 15-20 minutes, depending on thickness of bones.
Meanwhile, toss parsley, shallots, oil, lemon juice, and capers in a medium bowl to coat. Season salad to taste with gray sea salt and pepper.
Divide marrow bones and salad among plates. Serve with toast and gray sea salt. Using a long, thin spoon, scoop marrow onto toast, top with salad, and garnish with a pinch or two of salt.

roast-duck-legs-with-red-wine-sauce.name: Roast Duck Legs With Red Wine Sauce
instructions: Preheat an oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Spread the rosemary sprigs and garlic cloves into a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Place the duck legs on top of the rosemary, and sprinkle with salt and five-spice powder. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Meanwhile, bring the wine to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir in the currant jelly until dissolved. Reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer 5 minutes; set aside.

After the duck has cooked 1 hour, pour off and discard the fat that has accumulated in the baking dish. Pour the wine sauce over the duck legs, and bake 15 minutes more until the duck is very tender and the sauce has thickened slightly.

roast-fish-with-cannellini-beans-and-gre.name: Roast Fish With Cannellini Beans And Green Olives

ingredients.item: Whole skinless whitefish fillet (such as cod

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Combine oregano, beans, olives, and ½ cup water in a shallow 3-qt. baking dish; season lightly with salt. Place fish on top and nestle into beans; season fish generously with salt. Scatter shallots and chile over fish and beans. Very thinly slice 1 lemon and wriggle out seeds. Arrange slices, slightly overlapping, over surface of fish. Drizzle everything with oil and roast until fish is opaque throughout and flesh in the center flakes when gently pressed, 25–35 minutes, depending on the type and thickness of the fish. Let rest, occasionally pressing beans down into the liquid so they don’t dry out, 5–10 minutes.
Cut remaining lemon into wedges and serve alongside fish and beans for squeezing over.

roast-prime-rib-with-garlic-herb-butter.name: Roast Prime Rib With Garlic Herb Butter
instructions: Preheat the oven to 107°C (105°C). Set a wire rack over a rimmed baking sheet.
Season the prime rib all over with the salt and pepper.
Make the garlic herb butter: In a small bowl, mix together the butter, lemon zest, salt, garlic, parsley, rosemary, and pepper until well combined.
Transfer butter to a sheet of plastic wrap and roll into a log. Twist the ends to seal well. Refrigerate at least 1 hour, or until ready to serve.

Set the prime rib on the prepared baking sheet and place in the oven for 3½–4 hours, until the internal temperature reaches at least 54°C (55°C), or 15° less than your desired final temperature — no less than 63°C. Remove from the oven and let rest for 30 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to 260°C (260°C).
Return the prime rib to the oven for 5–10 minutes, or until a brown, crispy crust forms on the surface. Remove from the oven.
To carve, use a boning knife to cut along the inside of the rib bones, separating them from the roast, then separate the ribs. Slice against the grain of the rest of the roast into ½-inch slices.
Slice the butter into ¼-inch thick rounds.
Serve the prime rib immediately with the butter rounds on top.
Enjoy!

roasted-beetroot-salad-argiro.name: Roasted Beetroot Salad

ingredients.item: Roasted garlic from the packet cooked by beetroot
Roasted garlic from the packet cooked by beetroot

instructions: Remove the leaves from the beetroots and wash them very well, rubbing the peel with a sponge.
Place double foil on a baking pan.
Place the beetroots and garlic (with their peel) on the foil. Pour with some vinegar and olive oil.
Cover with extra aluminum foil and seal the edges so that they are cooked airtight.
Bake in a preheated oven for about 1 hour and 15 minutes, until soft.
We check with the blade of a knife if they're cooked properly.
Let the beets cool and peel.
Cut them into quince pieces
In a bowl, mix all the ingredients for the dressing and herbs.
Add the beets and pour the dressing. Mix gently and serve.

roasted-butternut-and-black-bean-enchila.name: Roasted Butternut And Black Bean Enchiladas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Toss butternut squash, onion, garlic, and olive oil together on a baking sheet; season with chipotle powder and salt.
Roast in the preheated oven until squash is tender, about 25 minutes, stirring once. Set aside to cool. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Gently stir black beans and goat cheese into squash mixture to avoid breaking up goat cheese.
Coat a 10x6-inch casserole dish with cooking spray. Pour 1/4 cup enchilada sauce over bottom of the dish.

Pour some enchilada sauce onto a small plate. Quickly dip 1 tortilla into sauce; fill with some squash-bean mixture. Roll tortilla to enclose filling; place seam-side down into the prepared casserole dish. Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling, tucking any remaining or loose filling into exposed ends of enchiladas. Spoon remaining sauce over enchiladas; top with cotija cheese and cilantro.
Bake in the preheated oven until heated through, about 25 minutes.

roasted-butternut-squash-soup.name: Roasted Butternut Squash Soup

ingredients.prep: peeled, seeded and cut into 2 in (5 cm) cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200°C).
In a large bowl, toss the butternut squash with 2 tablespoons of olive oil and 1 teaspoon of salt until well coated. Spread the squash in a single layer on an unlined baking sheet.
Roast the squash for 60–70 minutes, until completely tender and just beginning to brown on the edges.

Once the squash has been roasting for 40 minutes, start the soup: In a large stock pot, melt 2 tablespoons of butter and the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion and season with 1 teaspoon of salt. Sauté for 8–10 minutes, until the onion is translucent and fragrant.

Add the garlic and sage and stir to combine. Sauté for another 8–10 minutes, until the onions are beginning to caramelize slightly. Add the white wine and cook for 2–4 minutes, until reduced by about half.

Add the squash to the pot, along with the vegetable broth. Increase the heat to medium-high and bring to a boil. Cover the pot and reduce the heat to medium-low. Simmer for 15–20 minutes, until the squash is completely broken down.

Remove the pot from the heat. Stir in the heavy cream and remaining 2 tablespoons of butter. Using an immersion blender, blend until the soup is completely smooth and creamy. Season with the remaining ½ teaspoon of salt,  plus more to taste.
Ladle the hot soup into bowls. Top with the toasted walnuts, a drizzle of heavy cream, and a drizzle of chive oil.
To make the chive oil, combine the ice and 3 cups (720 ml) of water in a medium bowl. Set near the stovetop.

Add the remaining 3 cups (720 ml) of water to a small saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Add the chives to the simmering water and blanch for 30 seconds, then strain. Transfer the strainer directly to the ice bath to halt the cooking process. Let the chives cool for 1 minute, then drain on paper towels.

Add the chives and oil to a liquid measuring cup or other tall, narrow container. Using an immersion blender, blend until the chives are completely broken down. Do not overblend, as the chives can turn brown.
Place a damp paper towel inside a strainer and set over a medium bowl. Pour the chive oil through the strainer to remove any remaining solids.
Use the chive oil as desired. It will keep in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 months.
Enjoy!

roasted-cabbage-wedges.name: Roasted Cabbage Wedges
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut the head of cabbage in half vertically through the core. Cut each half into 4 wedges. Place the wedges on the baking sheet.
Combine butter, caraway seeds, and vinegar in small bowl. Brush 1/2 of the mixture over the wedges. Season with salt and pepper.

Roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Gently flip the wedges, brush with remaining butter mixture, and season with more salt and pepper. Return to the oven and roast until wedges are soft and edges are lightly charred, 8 to 10 minutes more.

roasted-cauliflower-and-ricotta-pie.name: Roasted Cauliflower And Ricotta Pie

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss cauliflower, lemon, anchovies, garlic, and capers with oil on a large rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper.
Roast, tossing occasionally, until cauliflower is tender but not browned, about 20 minutes. Squeeze lemon juice over cauliflower and toss to coat. Discard lemon and garlic, if desired.
DO AHEAD: Precooking the cauliflower and breadcrumbs means they will get toasty and crisp as the pie bakes. An extra step, yes, but well worth it.
Meanwhile, toss breadcrumbs and oil on a large rimmed baking sheet; toast, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool; toss with Parmesan.
Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 525° or as high as oven will go.

Once dough has risen in baking sheet, top with mozzarella, dot with ricotta, and top with cauliflower mixture. Bake until golden brown and crisp on bottom and sides, 20–30 minutes. Top pie with toasted breadcrumbs and bake 1 minute longer.
Serve topped with parsley.

roasted-radicchio-with-anchovy-vinaigret.name: Roasted Radicchio With Anchovy Vinaigrette, Preserved Lemon, And Breadcrumbs

ingredients.item: Finely grated grana padano or parmesan cheese

ingredients.prep: drained, minced, 1 1/2 teaspoons oil from tin reserved
each cut into 6 wedges with some core attached to each wedge

ingredients.item: Shavings of grana padano or parmesan cheese

instructions: Mix lemon slices, lemon juice, and coarse sea salt in small skillet. Bring to boil; reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until almost tender, about 10 minutes. Uncover and cool. Drain lemon slices. Using sharp knife, cut slices in half, then cut pulp away from peel; discard pulp. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Mix cheese, lemon juice, garlic, minced anchovies, and pinch of sugar in medium bowl. Whisk in olive oil and 1 1/2 teaspoons oil from anchovy tin. Season vinaigrette to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature and rewhisk before using.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Line rimmed baking sheet with foil. Mix 1 tablespoon olive oil and garlic in medium bowl. Add bread cubes, oregano, and crushed red pepper; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Transfer bread cubes to prepared baking sheet.
Bake bread cubes until golden brown, tossing occasionally, about 20 minutes. Cool. Transfer to work surface. Cover with paper towels. Using mallet or rolling pin, crush bread cubes into breadcrumbs.

Preheat broiler. Line same baking sheet with fresh sheet of foil. Place radicchio wedges in large bowl. Drizzle remaining 3 tablespoons oil over; sprinkle with salt and pepper and toss to coat. Arrange wedges on prepared sheet. Broil until beginning to brown, about 3 minutes. Using tongs, turn radicchio over, fanning leaves out slightly. Broil until radicchio is soft and beginning to brown with some edges beginning to char, watching carefully to prevent burning, about 2 minutes longer.

Return radicchio to same large bowl. Drizzle enough dressing over to coat; toss. Arrange wedges on plates. Sprinkle breadcrumbs over. Top with cheese shavings, arrange a few preserved lemon peel strips over, and serve.

roasted-sardines-with-potato-salad-and-p.name: Roasted Sardines With Potato Salad And Peppers
roasted-sardines-with-potato-salad-and-p.original_name: Sardinhas assadas com salada de batata e pimentos
instructions: Brush the sardines with olive oil, season them with thick salt and grill them until golden and cooked.
Cook the chips with the skin in salted water. Spill them, let them cool down and eliminate the skin. Reserve.
Grate the peppers until the skin burns. Then put them in a plastic bag and close. Eliminate their skin and seeds and cut them into strips.

Corte as batatas em metades ou quartos e misture com os pimentos e a cebola roxa, previamente picada. Tempere com um fio de azeite, a salsa picada, sal e pimenta. Envolva, cuidadosamente, e sirva com as sardinhas.

roasted-turkey-breast-with-spices-and-he.name: Roasted Turkey Breast With Spices And Herbs
roasted-turkey-breast-with-spices-and-he.original_name: Peito de peru assado com especiarias e ervas
instructions: In a bowl put the old mustard and the mixture of spices (tome, fennel and grain cumin), add the paprika and wrap all ingredients very well.

Fix the meat and dispose of it on a tray, water it with white wine and a spoon of spice and mustard. Season with salt and pepper, water with olive oil and bring to the oven preheated at 160oC approximately 30 minutes. Then remove, slice into slices and serve decorated to taste.

roasted-vegetable-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Vegetable Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 pc big size egg plan Tags

instructions: 1. Take eggplant, peppers, tomatoes, onion, garlic and caviar oven tray.
2. Discover a little olive oil on the car.
3. Öpreheated from 200 degrees of oven to soften vegetables and fry the shells (about 25–30 minutes).
4. O peel off the shells of peppers and cups (can be peeled on the peel of per request).
5. Thickly chopped vegetables.
6. Kö take vegetables in the pot.
7. U add Opal juice (or hot water) to the vehicle and deerç from the blender.
8. Get a Smoothate fit.
9. Add salt, pepper and red pepper and boil up to 5–10 minutes.
10. You can add a bit more hot water if it is dark.
11. 11. Serve hot.
12. You can add drop olive oil, a spoon yogurt or yeast to your car.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

roasted-yams-with-citrus-salsa.name: Roasted Yams With Citrus Salsa

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil. Place yams and 1 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper and toss to evenly coat. Arrange yams on prepared sheet in a single layer; roast until tender and lightly browned, about 25 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk remaining 3 Tbsp. oil, cilantro, shallot, orange juice, lime juice, and honey in a small bowl. Season salsa to taste with salt and pepper.
Transfer yams to a platter. Drizzle salsa over and sprinkle with pistachios and raisins.

roasted-jalapeno-pimiento-cheese-toasts.name: Roasted-jalapeño Pimiento Cheese Toasts
instructions: Roast bell pepper and jalapeño over a gas flame, turning often, until skin is blistered and charred all over, 5–10 minutes. (Alternatively, broil on a rimmed baking sheet.) Transfer to a medium bowl and cover with plastic wrap; let steam 10 minutes.

Peel and seed peppers, then finely chop. Mix mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, cayenne, and paprika in a medium bowl. Fold in cheddar and chopped peppers; season with salt and black pepper. Spread on ciabatta and slice crosswise into pieces. Serve with pickles.
Do Ahead: Pimiento cheese can be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

roccos-how-low-can-you-go-low-fat-marina.name: Rocco's How Low Can You Go Low-fat Marinara Sauce

ingredients.item: Piece of parmigiano- reggiano cheese rind

instructions: Heat a Dutch oven over medium heat. When the pot is hot, add the olive oil. Add the garlic and onion, and season them with salt and crushed red pepper to taste. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion and garlic are translucent, about 4 minutes.
Add the tomato puree, water, and Parmigiano-Reggiano rind to the pot. Bring to a simmer. Then cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for about 25 minutes.

With the back of a knife, bruise the basil and stir the sprig into the sauce. Simmer the sauce, uncovered, for 5 minutes. Season with salt and crushed red pepper to taste, if desired. Serve, or store in a covered container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.

roll-with-minced-chicken-and-potatoes-ar.name: Roll With Minced Chicken And Potatoes
roll-with-minced-chicken-and-potatoes-ar.original_name: Ρολό με κιμά κοτόπουλο και πατάτες

ingredients.item: A little dried thyme or oregano
A little dried thyme or oregano

instructions: Heat the olive oil (3 tabletspoons) and sauté the chopped onions until they become transparent, but not golden.
Add the garage and continue the sauce for 1-2 minutes.
Finally, add the tomato and boil over medium heat for 10 minutes.
Allow the sauce to cool

romesco-sauce.name: Romesco Sauce

ingredients.item: Roasted red bell pepper from a jar
Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Pulse 1 large roasted red bell pepper from a jar, 1 garlic clove, smashed, ½ cup slivered almonds, toasted, ¼ cup tomato purée, 2 Tbsp. chopped flat-leaf parsley, 2 Tbsp. sherry vinegar, 1 tsp. smoked paprika, and ½ tsp. cayenne pepper in a food processor until very finely chopped.

With motor running, slowly add ½ cup extra-virgin olive oil; process until smooth. Season with fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.


Do Ahead: Romesco can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

rosemary-biscuits-lezzet.name: Rosemary Biscuits

ingredients.item: 200 gr butter (softened in the heat of the room)

instructions: 1. blend flour, corn flour, pepper, grated orange peel and salt in a bowl.
2. Cook until it comes to the consistency of the cream with butter and sugar mixer in a separate container.
3. Continue to add eggs and cook.
4. Add flour mixture and mix well.
5. Separate the dough into pieces and wrap it into stretch film and wait for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
6. Open dough on the unified countertop and cut with the cookie mold.
7. Set up the oiled paper serial tray and cook 12-15 minutes in the oven of 170 degrees.
8. Serve.
